source_name: European Commission / Executive VP Henna Virkkunen
text: We are concerned about mounting indications of coordinated foreign online influence operation targeting ongoing Romanian elections especially on TikTok. The European Commission sent an urgent request for information to TikTok under the Digital Services Act demanding explanations for intelligence revelations showing that Georgescu's rise had not been a natural outcome but the result of artificially coordinated action to manipulate and exploit TikTok's algorithm.
